Name: Camel
Monster sheet: AC 10, HP 12, ATK 1 hoof +3 (1d6) or 1 spit (near) +0 (1d4), MV double near, S +3, D +0, C +3, I -2,W +1, Ch -3, AL N, LV 2
Description: A hardy desert beast with a distinctive hump. Can travel for days without water and endure scorching heat.

Name: Camel, silver
Monster sheet: AC 10, HP 13, ATK 1 hoof +3 (1d6) or 1 spit (near) +0 (1d4), MV double near, S +3, D +0, C +4, I -2, W +1, Ch +0, AL N, LV 2
Description: A rare albino camel bred for desert royalty. More obedient than its common kin and capable of longer marches.

Name: Donkey
Monster sheet: AC 10, HP 6, ATK 1 hoof +3 (1d4), MV near, S +3, D +0, C +2, I -2, W +1, Ch -2, AL N, LV 1
Description: A sturdy, dependable pack animal. Slow but sure-footed on rough terrain, ideal for carrying heavy loads.

Name: Elephant
Monster sheet: AC 14, HP 34, ATK 2 tusks +6 (1d8), MV near, S +5, D +0, C +3, I -2, W +1, Ch +0, AL N, LV 7 Charge. Move up to double near in straight line and make 1 tusks attack. If hit, x3 damage.
Description: A massive and intelligent beast capable of carrying several riders and enormous quantities of cargo.

Monster sheet: AC 11, HP 11, ATK 1 hooves +3 (1d6), MV double near, S +3, D +1, C +2, I -3, W +1, Ch -2, AL N, LV 2
Description: The most common mount across the realm — fast, strong, and bred for long journeys on open roads.

Name: Horse, war
Monster sheet: AC 11, HP 15, ATK 1 hooves +4 (1d6), MV double near, S +3, D +1, C +2, I -3, W +1, Ch -1, AL N, LV 3
Description: A specially trained battle horse bred to remain calm amid the chaos of combat. Follows voice commands.

Name: Scrag
Monster sheet: AC 12, HP 11, ATK 1 claw +2 (1d6), MV near (climb), S +2, D +2, C +2, I -2, W +1, Ch -3, AL N, LV 2
Description: A large, lizard-like beast from the underground realms. Preferred by dark elves for its silence and sure footing.

Name: Scrag, war
